case_title: BAMDAD, HOMAYOUN vs. TSAR NICOULAI CAVIAR,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORP

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAMDAD, HOMAYOUN AS TO DEFENDANT TSAR NICOULAI CAVIAR,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORP
REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAMDAD, HOMAYOUN AS TO DEFENDANT TSAR NICOULAI CAVIAR,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORP
